# israel-welfare-inspection-dataset-builder

Planning/scaffold repository for an authorized public-data transparency ETL
pipeline. This builder repo contains code, schemas, tests, docs, configs, CI,
and small reviewed fixtures. Generated dataset artifacts belong in the paired
data repo: `AdanimInstitue/israel-welfare-inspection-dataset`.

## Core Tree

```text
src/
  welfare_inspections/
    __init__.py      package version
    cli.py           placeholder CLI entrypoint

schemas/
  report.schema.json       placeholder report contract
  facility.schema.json     placeholder facility contract
  inspection.schema.json   placeholder inspection finding contract
  datapackage.schema.json  placeholder data-package contract

tests/
  test_imports.py      package and CLI smoke tests
  test_docs_exist.py   docs/schema existence and content-contract tests

docs/
  architecture.md
  source_site_notes.md
  schema.md
  extraction_methodology.md
  data_quality.md
  privacy_and_publication_policy.md
  operations.md
  roadmap.md
  implementation_plan.md

data_samples/
  raw_pdfs/           placeholder only; real PDFs require explicit review
  expected_outputs/   future text-based golden outputs

.github/
  workflows/ci.yml
  workflows/pr-agent-context-refresh.yml
  pr-agent-context-template.md
```

## Critical Contracts

- Static agent rules: `AGENTS.md`
- Dynamic agent state: `.agent-plan.md`
- Canonical source URL and pagination notes: `docs/source_site_notes.md`
- Canonical entity model: `docs/schema.md`
- Deterministic-first parsing strategy: `docs/extraction_methodology.md`
- Fixture policy and quality model: `docs/data_quality.md`
- Privacy, disclaimer, and CC BY 4.0 publication policy:
  `docs/privacy_and_publication_policy.md`
- Immediate roadmap: `docs/roadmap.md` and `docs/implementation_plan.md`

## Automation

- Local validation: `python -m pip install -e ".[dev]"`, `ruff check .`,
  `pytest`
- CI: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- PR context comments and patch coverage: `pr-agent-context` job in CI
- Review/check refresh comments: `.github/workflows/pr-agent-context-refresh.yml`
